mapper.select: SELECT DEPT_CD, ORG_CD, DEPT_NM, ORD, USE_YN, CRT_BY, CRT_IP, CRT_PGM, TO_CHAR(CRT_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CRT_AT, UPD_BY, UPD_IP, UPD_PGM, TO_CHAR(UPD_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPD_AT FROM CMS_COM_DEPT WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}

SELECT DEPT_CD, ORG_CD, DEPT_NM, ORD, USE_YN, CRT_BY, CRT_IP, CRT_PGM, TO_CHAR(CRT_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CRT_AT, UPD_BY, UPD_IP, UPD_PGM, TO_CHAR(UPD_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPD_AT FROM CMS_COM_DEPT WHERE ORG_CD = #{orgCd} ORDER BY ORD, DEPT_CD
mapper.update:
UPDATE CMS_COM_DEPT SET ORG_CD = #{vo.orgCd}, DEPT_NM = #{vo.deptNm}, ORD = #{vo.ord}, USE_YN = COALESCE(#{vo.useYn}, USE_YN),
WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}
